mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS id, c.title AS title, c.type AS type, c.status AS status, c.channel_id AS channel_id, ch.name AS channel_name, chu.name AS church_name, c.thumbnail_key AS thumbnail_key, c.view_count AS view_count, c.duration_sec AS duration_sec, c.created_at AS created_at, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(h.name ORDER BY h.name SEPARATOR ',') FROM CONTENT_HASHTAG cht JOIN HASHTAG h ON h.id = cht.hashtag_id WHERE cht.content_id = c.id) AS hashtags FROM CONTENT c JOIN CHANNEL ch ON c.channel_id = ch.id JOIN CHURCH chu ON ch.church_id = chu.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONTENT c JOIN CHANNEL ch ON c.channel_id = ch.id

SELECT c.id AS id, c.title AS title, c.description AS description, c.type AS type, c.status AS status, c.channel_id AS channel_id, ch.name AS channel_name, chu.name AS church_name, c.media_url AS media_url, c.hls_prefix AS hls_prefix, c.thumbnail_key AS thumbnail_key, c.duration_sec AS duration_sec, c.view_count AS view_count, c.created_at AS created_at, c.updated_at AS updated_at FROM CONTENT c JOIN CHANNEL ch ON c.channel_id = ch.id JOIN CHURCH chu ON ch.church_id = chu.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
